title: NIIT Foundation is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: NIIT Foundation is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the NIIT Foundation family as a Subject Matter Expert in Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NIIT Foundation:
NIIT Foundation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Foundation!
